action_set_definitions.name: get_production_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metadata and recent batch IDs for a specific production unit to identify which batch was associated with the reported excursion.

equipment_id.description: The ID of the tank or equipment (e.g., 'FORM-B-102').

action_set_definitions.name: get_microbial_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the laboratory results for a specific batch, including the genus/species of the contaminant and its typical environmental niche.

batch_id.description: The unique identifier for the material batch.

action_set_definitions.name: get_scada_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the high-level SCADA process parameter summary reported by the automated system for a specific batch/timeframe.

batch_id.description: The batch ID associated with the run.

action_set_definitions.name: get_detailed_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Queries raw time-series sensor data (e.g., specific thermocouple readings, flow meter fluctuations) that may not be reflected in the high-level SCADA summary.

telemetry_category.description: The type of sensor data to audit.

action_set_definitions.name: get_mechanical_layout
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the engineering specifications and component list for the equipment to map data anomalies to physical hardware.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_analysis_report
action_set_definitions.description: Final action to submit the identified failed component, the root cause logic, and the engineering remediation plan.

failed_component.description: The exact name of the mechanical part that failed.

investigative_logic.description: Explanation of why SCADA reported nominal results despite the failure.

state_description.production_line_metadata: Static info about the line being analyzed.
state_description.process_parameters: Current machine settings (e.g., temperature, pressure, conveyor speed).
state_description.sensor_telemetry_history: A time-series buffer of internal sensor readings used to generate query responses.
state_description.material_batch_properties: Internal tracking of raw material quality and batch IDs.
state_description.hidden_root_cause: The actual underlying defect cause that the Agent is trying to find (e.g., 'worn_bearing_axis_3'). This must NEVER be leaked in observations.
state_description.defect_metrics: Current rate of output defects (e.g., surface scratches, weight variance).
